An Intarian Welcome
Opening Auction Simulator
Uniform-price call auction — maximize traded volume, tie-break by higher price. You submit last; within a price level you are last in line. Fees and post-auction fair value apply.

Order BookDRYLAND_FLAX

Volume
Price
Price
Volume

Your Limit Orderqueue rank 0 = first

Economicspost-auction FV & fees

Rules: Clearing P* maximizes min(demand≥P, supply≤P), ties broken by higher P. Strictly-better orders fill fully; at P* the long side rations by time (you last). Net per unit = (FV − P* − fees) on your filled qty.

Set FV and fees, then click Find Optimal.
